task: #5 (P8.1) Q8_0 batched WMMA prefill GEMM in qwen35moe GGUF 512/0
summary: Landed the P8.1 GGUF Q8_0 batched WMMA prefill kernel (gguf_q8_0_prefill_wmma_kernel<scalar_t,out_t,TM,TN>) and wired it behind an opt-in (HIPENGINE_GGUF_WMMA_PREFILL=1, PrefillConfig.use_wmma_prefill, set_wmma_prefill_enabled, use_wmma_prefill= per-call kwarg). On qwen35moe Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M at 512/0 (local RX 7900 XTX/gfx1100; W7900 not rerun), prefill improves from 107.176 tok/s to 172.822 tok/s (+61.25%, wall-clock 4.777s -> 2.963s, saving 1814.6 ms per 512-token prefill). The Q8_0 dense/shared bucket collapses from 1929.2 ms / 251 dispatches (decode-shaped gguf_k_prefill_out_kernel/pack8 family) to 81.1 ms / 250 dispatches (gguf_q8_0_prefill_wmma_kernel), a 95.8% kernel-time reduction on that bucket and a -38.05% total prefill kernel time reduction. Memory is unchanged (no new resident weight repack). Selected MoE bucket (Q4_K/Q5_K/Q6_K, ~2102 ms) is unchanged by P8.1 and is the next lever (P8.2/P8.4/P8.5).

hardware.gpu: local RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 (W7900 not rerun)

changes: docs: plan P8 batched prefill GEMM for qwen35moe GGUF (cdccb45).

kernel: P8.1 GGUF Q8_0 batched WMMA prefill GEMM (cc73c43); new hipengine/kernels/hip_gfx1100/quant/gguf_q8_0_prefill.{hip,py}, mirrors awq_fusedw4_prefill_fp16_kernel template from paro_awq_gemv.hip, 32 threads/block, __launch_bounds__(32, 8), __builtin_amdgcn_wmma_f32_16x16x16_f16_w32 accumulator, 9 dtype combos registered under ('hip_gfx1100','linear','gguf_q8_0','wmma_prefill_<in>_<out>_out').

feat: wire Q8_0 WMMA prefill into gguf_linear dispatch (opt-in) (9712c64); new _wmma_prefill_dispatch rewriter + _launch_wmma_raw ABI handler + PrefillConfig.use_wmma_prefill + HIPENGINE_GGUF_WMMA_PREFILL env var + set_wmma_prefill_enabled session toggle. Default behavior unchanged.
test: P8.4 correctness tests for Q8_0 WMMA batched prefill, 69 tests (cb4fe3f).

commands.baseline_rocprof: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_GGUF_WMMA_PREFILL=0 PYTHONPATH=. rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv --output-directory /tmp/p8_bench/rocprof-baseline -- python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 0 --warmup-decode-tokens 0 --warmup-runs 0 --measured-runs 1 --graph-steps-per-replay 1 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p8_bench/rocprof-baseline-bench.json
commands.wmma_rocprof: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_GGUF_WMMA_PREFILL=1 PYTHONPATH=. rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv --output-directory /tmp/p8_bench/rocprof-wmma -- python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 0 --warmup-decode-tokens 0 --warmup-runs 0 --measured-runs 1 --graph-steps-per-replay 1 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p8_bench/rocprof-wmma-bench.json
commands.correctness_tests: uv run --with pytest pytest tests/test_gguf_q8_0_wmma_prefill.py tests/test_gguf_linear_dispatch.py tests/test_gguf_k_gemv.py tests/test_gguf_q4_k_gemv.py

correctness.method: P8.1 kernel: 69 tests in tests/test_gguf_q8_0_wmma_prefill.py compare against the cpu_reference.gguf_q8_0_gemv oracle with np.testing.assert_allclose at per-dtype ULP tolerances. P8.3 dispatch: 21 tests in tests/test_gguf_linear_dispatch.py cover the opt-in matrix. Cross-file isolation green: 100 passed in 3.14 s across P8 tests + the existing GGUF GEMV tests.
correctness.summary: All 69 tests in tests/test_gguf_q8_0_wmma_prefill.py pass on W7900. Inline-smoke worst-case error budgets vs cpu_reference.gguf_q8_0_gemv: bf16->f32 max|d| < 1.2e-6; f32->f32 max|d| = 2.4e-7 (single ULP); bf16->bf16 max_rel < 4e-3 (one bf16 ULP, expected: WMMA reorders the K reduction vs the row-GEMV).

q8_0_dense_shared_bucket_ms.note: On the WMMA run, 1 lingering decode-shaped Q8_0 dispatch remains. That is the gguf_k_pack8_prefill_out_kernel<unsigned short, float, 8> Q8_0 lm-head logits projection (the runner passes output_dtype='f32' for the final tied lm-head, which the rows>1 path handles outside the rewrite when no decode tokens follow). Not a regression.

selected_moe_bucket_ms.note: Unchanged by P8.1 (P8.2/P8.4/P8.5 land Q4_K/Q5_K/Q6_K WMMA variants).

gdn_recurrent_bucket_ms.note: Unchanged by P8.1; out of scope.

rocprof.method: Two rocprofv3 --kernel-trace runs of qwen35_gguf_bench.py --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 0 --warmup-decode-tokens 0 --warmup-runs 0 --measured-runs 1 (no decode, no graph capture). Kernels grouped by full templated symbol; durations summed from (End_Timestamp - Start_Timestamp).

p8_plan_gate_status.note: P8.1 alone does not clear the 1500 ms acceptance floor because the Q4_K/Q5_K/Q6_K selected MoE bucket (~2102 ms unchanged) is still the dominant cost. P8.2/P8.4/P8.5 are the next levers.

blocker.summary: P8 plan is partially closed by P8.1. To clear the 1500 ms total prefill kernel time acceptance floor, the selected MoE bucket (Q4_K gate+up + Q5_K/Q6_K down, ~2102 ms unchanged in this run) must drop. That requires P8.4 (Q4_K dual selected WMMA prefill) and P8.5 (Q5_K/Q6_K selected WMMA prefill). P8.2 (Q4_K dense dual WMMA prefill) is also valuable for dense Q4_K models.
